name: Jove Table Lamp - 18 Inch Height - TBL4520 - White/Brass - Safavieh
description:
Introduce a touch of elegance and refinement to your space with the Jove Table Lamp. This stylish lighting piece features a sleek white metal body complemented by a brass-colored shade that brings warmth and sophistication to any room. The lamp's dimensions ensure a substantial presence, making it an ideal statement piece for desks, side tables, or nightstands.

Crafted with a durable metal body and shade, the Jove Table Lamp is designed for enduring appeal and functionality. Its white base serves as a neutral foundation, allowing the brass shade to stand out as a chic and tasteful highlight. The lamp's clean lines and minimalist aesthetic make it versatile for various decor themes, from modern to traditional.

Whether you're aiming to brighten up your work area or enhance the ambiance of your living space, the Jove Table Lamp offers both practical illumination and a visually striking design that complements your home's style. Experience the blend of functionality and aesthetic charm with this tasteful lighting choice.
